campaign.name: Credo Legal — Debt Defense v3 (Meta)
campaign.notes: Consumer-debt/financial ads require Meta CREDIT Special Ad Category. This restricts targeting: no targeting by age (<18 blocked anyway), gender, ZIP; detailed-targeting limited; geo radius >=15 miles. Launch PAUSED for operator QA.

targeting_defaults.note: NY excluded per compliance. TX & FL require ad filing (FL pre-approval BEFORE launch, $150/ad; TX post-filing within 10 days, $100/ad) plus local-counsel-on-ad — do not launch TX/FL until handled.

headlines_campaign_wide: Get a Free Review of Your Case
See If You Can Fight Back
You Don't Have to Face Them Alone
compliance_footer: Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
compliance_footer_note: Appended to the bottom of every message (primary text). Universal layer only; state-specific disclosures handled separately per the compliance matrix.

ads.description: Flat monthly fee. Attorneys licensed in your state.

messages.Default:
Sued by a credit card company? The clock is already ticking. Miss the deadline to respond and they can win by default. Our attorneys can file your answer and make the creditor prove they own the debt and the amount. If they can't, your case could be dismissed.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
messages.Fight:
Being sued by a credit card company? They have lawyers who do this every day, and a default judgment is their easy win. Our attorneys can file your answer and force them to prove they even own the debt. Make them earn it instead of handing it to them.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
messages.Reassurance:
Did a credit card lawsuit just land in your hands? You are not the first to face this, and it is not as hopeless as it feels right now. Our attorneys can take it from here, file your response, and stand between you and the creditor. You could get through this.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
messages.Affordability:
Sued over a credit card and worried you can't afford a lawyer? Your defense is a flat monthly fee, not a big upfront retainer. Our attorneys can file your answer and make the creditor prove the debt is valid. Serious defense, at a price that fits your budget.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
messages.Fresh Start:
What if this credit card lawsuit didn't have to hang over your year? Right now it colors everything. Our attorneys can answer the suit and challenge whether the debt holds up. You could put it behind you and move on.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.

ads.description: Flat monthly fee. We talk to them, not you.

messages.Default:
Getting calls non-stop, at work, at dinner, on weekends? The pressure follows you and you dread your own phone. Our attorneys can send a cease-communication letter and pursue the collector for violations. The calls could stop, and they could owe you up to $1,000 per violation.

messages.Fresh Start:

ads.description: Flat monthly fee. Attorney-led from day one.

messages.Default:
Buried under a credit card balance that keeps growing? Confusing interest and fees pile on, and you may not owe every dollar your creditors claim. Our attorneys can challenge whether the debt is valid and negotiate your balance down. You could pay less than what they say you owe.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
messages.Fight:
Assuming you owe every dollar a creditor claims? That assumption is exactly what they bank on. Our attorneys can challenge whether the debt is even valid and push the balance down. Make them justify the number before you pay it.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
messages.Reassurance:

ads.description: Flat monthly fee. Attorneys licensed in your state.

messages.Default:
Sued by a debt collector? You usually have just 20 to 28 days to reply, and missing the window lets them win automatically and move to garnish your pay. Our attorneys can file your court answer and demand the collector prove they own the debt. Your case could be dismissed if they can't.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
messages.Fight:
A debt collector dragging you into court? They expect you to miss the deadline and hand them a default. Our attorneys can file your answer and demand they prove they own the debt. Don't give them an easy win.

messages.Reassurance:

ads.description: Flat monthly fee. We sue them for breaking the rules.

messages.Default:
Are collectors threatening you, calling at odd hours, and contacting people you know? Most people never learn that much of it is against the law. Our attorneys can document the violations and sue the collector under the FDCPA. They could owe you up to $1,000 per violation.

Crēdo Legal. The choice of a lawyer is an important decision and should not be based solely upon advertisements.
